# containers

**Instance Property**

An array of dictionaries used to configure each container of type [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.ContainerConfig].

## Declaration

```swift
attribute CloudKit.ContainerConfig[] containers;
```
